ew_context: Price completing corrective wave 2 or B wave at resistance — double top confirms rejection from key level
pattern_desc: Double top formation with peaks at 57.61 and 57.33 showing clear resistance. Current breakdown below neckline confirms bearish reversal pattern.
invalidation: Close above 57.61 on D1 timeframe would negate the double top reversal pattern
market_context: Crypto sector facing regulatory headwinds with stablecoin concerns weighing on altcoin sentiment including LTC
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

LTCUSD has formed a clear double top pattern with peaks at 57.61 and 57.33, representing strong resistance in the mid-57 area. The pattern shows textbook characteristics with the second peak slightly lower, indicating weakening momentum at the highs. Current price at 55.31 suggests the breakdown phase is developing with neckline support around 54.44 area already breached.

RSI at 47.2% shows neutral to slightly bearish momentum with room for further decline, while EMA20 at 55.34 just below EMA50 at 55.57 confirms the bearish trend shift. ATR of 1.10 indicates moderate volatility suitable for swing positioning. CFD momentum alignment supports the bearish technical setup.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 57.61 (double top high and key reversal level)
- **Support**: 53.99 (intermediate support) and 50.72 (pattern target)

## Invalidation Level

Close above 57.61 on D1 timeframe would negate the double top structure and suggest continuation higher.

## Macro & Flow Context

Crypto regulatory concerns with stablecoin proposals "falling short" of bank deposit protection creating sector-wide headwinds. Flow data shows momentum alignment supporting the bearish technical pattern.
